title: ruler
description: Made several rulers to measure distance
body:
# Brief introduction

Added several tools for measuring the distance between blocks in the game

Supported languages:

\- Simplified Chinese

\- English

## Function

- Ruler: Click on a block to measure the distance between two blocks
- Laser rangefinder: remote measurement of the distance from the pointed block to the player
- Laser ruler: remote measurement of distance between two blocks

## install

1. Ensure that Fabric is installed.
2. Download the latest version of the mod file (. jar).
3. Put the mod files into the mods folder of Minecraft.
4. Launch Minecraft and enjoy mods!

## dependence

- [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
